name: Sonicor
description: Blasts targets with a massive wave of sonic energy. Results reported to be: 'Very Satisfying'.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Blasts targets with a massive wave of sonic energy. Results reported to be: 'Very Satisfying'.

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the self-stagger range on the Sonicor

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Update 25.5.0 + 25.5.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sonicor and Opticor having an overly bright FX.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sonicor using classic Pistol idle animations, instead of ‘wrist mounted’ animations.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.2
patchlogs.changes: Gave the Sonicor a bit of ‘oomph’ back by tweaking the ragdoll force to allow a more horizontal ragdoll as opposed to ragdolling in place. Does this bring it back to its skyrocketing ways? No. But now it has an appropriate amount of ‘oomph’ that doesn’t send you across the map to collect your dropped goodies.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the Sonicor doing pve damage in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.4.3+20.4.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Returned the Sonicor to it’s skyrocketing glory.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.10.1+19.10.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sonicor not causing knock down in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Right Dendra forearm guard clipping through arm mounted weapons like the Sonicor and Gammacor.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: The Sonicor’s camera explosion shake will no longer affect other players in the Squad.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an improper trigger finger animation appearing on players with the Sonicor equipped, but not in use.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.6
patchlogs.changes: Sonicor AoE radius increased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Sonicor/Gammacor holsters using the wrong energy colour.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sonicor sometimes appearing invisible in player hands.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sonicor’s projectiles not being stopped on Nullifier shields.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sonicor’s reload audio FX not playing.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sonicor projectiles detonating from inside the wall of a Snowglobe.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.additions: Sonicor: Blasts targets with a massive wave of sonic energy.  Reported results to be: ‘very satisfying’.
